topic: Faces in my kindergarten class photo have been getting crossed out one at a time in the same marker
title: Faces in My Kindergarten Class Photo Have Been Getting Crossed Out One at a Time | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Faces in my kindergarten class photo have been getting crossed out one at a time.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a vintage school class photograph in a plastic sleeve with two faces crossed out in black permanent marker, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Class of nineteen ninety. Eighteen kids. Group photo in plastic sleeve.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an old class photograph showing eighteen children in rows in front of a brick school wall, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Photo lives in a shoebox under my bed.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an old cardboard shoebox of photographs on a hardwood floor beside a bed, dim bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pulled it out for a reunion last June. Two faces had X marks.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a class photograph with two faces clearly marked with black X strokes, the marker fresh, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Assumed I had done it as a kid.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hand holding a class photograph, only the hand visible, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Marker was not faded. The strokes were precise.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of two crossed out faces on a class photograph showing fresh black marker strokes, no fading, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Photographed the photo. Stored it back.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone capturing a photograph of a class photograph on a kitchen counter, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three days later. Third face crossed out. New marks. Same color marker.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a class photograph with three faces now crossed out, the third X mark visibly fresher than the others, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Looked up my old classmates. The crossed out ones have died. In order. By X mark.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a laptop screen showing a list of obituary results with photographs blurred out, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There are five crosses now. I knew them in the order of the crosses.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a class photograph with five faces clearly crossed out in black marker, the order forming a path across the rows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I am face thirteen. I have not been crossed out yet.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a single face in a class photograph circled gently in pencil but not crossed out, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Boy on my left has a small X starting on his cheek this week.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a class photograph face beginning to show a small black mark across one cheek, the start of a cross, vertical 9:16 framing
